description_for_human: Ultra-Lightweight AI Agent Browser Toolkit. Pure Python, ZERO dependencies, ~5MB RAM. 6 modules included.
description_for_model: ZionBrowser is an ultra-lightweight CLI browser toolkit for AI agents. It uses pure Python stdlib with ZERO external dependencies and runs on just ~5MB RAM. Includes 6 modules: browser core, AI agent API, Chrome DevTools Protocol, learning AI (LION), auth token hunter (LION-1), and military security defender (PIRATE). Ideal for AI agents needing web browsing on resource-constrained systems, VPS, Raspberry Pi, or CI/CD environments. Price: $9.99 one-time.
